title: AI Engineer Career Roadmap
overview: This roadmap takes a beginner learner with web fundamentals toward an AI Engineer role through progressive skill building in Python, machine learning, LLM integration, deployment, and portfolio development.

phases.name: Foundation
topics: Version control with Git and GitHub
projects: Build a data cleaning and visualization notebook
Create a CLI tool that preprocesses CSV datasets
phases.milestone: Complete two Python projects and confidently explain core Python syntax, functions, and data handling.

phases.name: Machine Learning Core
projects: Train and compare classification models on a real dataset
Publish an end-to-end ML project with README and results
phases.milestone: Ship one reproducible ML project with clear evaluation metrics and documented tradeoffs.

phases.name: LLM and Deployment
projects: Build an AI-powered document Q&A app
Deploy a roadmap generator with a backend API and frontend UI
phases.milestone: Deploy a usable AI application that integrates an LLM, handles structured outputs, and includes monitoring basics.

marketTrends: AI Engineer roles increasingly expect LLM application development plus software engineering discipline.
Employers value candidates who can connect model outputs to production-ready APIs and user-facing products.
Retrieval-augmented generation, evaluation, and deployment reliability remain common hiring themes.
professionalTips: Keep a portfolio that demonstrates both experimentation and production thinking.
Write post-project reflections that explain technical decisions and tradeoffs.
Study job descriptions regularly and adapt your stack toward the most repeated tools and workflows.
